title: スライド作成skillはどうなった？
summary_text: 検知イベントです。 - **Concrete artifacts available**: `structured-native` はユーザー可視成果物まで生成済みです。 [output.pptx](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260319-v9-rerun/delivery/variants/structured-native/output.pptx) [output.pdf](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260319-v9-rerun/delivery/variants/structured-native/output.pdf) [preview-attempt-0](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260319-v9-rerun/delivery/variants/structured-native/preview-attempt-0) - **Stuck condition observed**: `nanobanana-manus` はファイル数 `0` のまま、最新更新が `2026-03-19 00:23:00` 以降増えていません。 [nanobanana-manus](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260319-v9-rerun/delivery/variants/nanobanana-manus) [structured-native/repair-log.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260319-v9-rerun/delivery/variants/structured-native/repair-log.json) - **Run still active but non-progressing on nanobanana branch**: lock は残存、実行 PID も存続。 [.run.lock](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260319-v9-rerun/delivery/.run.lock)
